parameters.query:
SELECT 
  t.id,
  t.title,
  t.description,
  t.task_type,
  t.category,
  t.difficulty,
  t.week,
  t.created_at,
  jr.title as job_role_title,
  c.name as company_name,
  eta.status as assignment_status,
  eta.completed_at as assignment_completed_at,
  eta.submitted_at as assignment_submitted_at,
  eta.submission_url as assignment_submission_url,
  eta.feedback as assignment_feedback,
  eta.score as assignment_score
FROM tasks t
LEFT JOIN job_roles jr ON t.job_role_id = jr.id
LEFT JOIN companies c ON jr.company_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN enhanced_task_assignments eta ON t.id = eta.task_id AND eta.student_id = '{{ $('Find user').item.json.id }}'
WHERE (
  -- Job assessment tasks
  (t.job_role_id IN (
    SELECT activity_id::uuid -- <-- CAST APPLIED HERE
    FROM student_history 
    WHERE student_id = '{{ $('Find user').item.json.id }}'
      AND activity_type = 'job_assessment'
      AND status = 'active'
  ))
  OR
  -- Learning path tasks
  (t.learning_path_template_id IN (
    SELECT activity_id::uuid -- <-- AND CAST APPLIED HERE
    FROM student_history 
    WHERE student_id = '{{ $('Find user').item.json.id }}'
      AND activity_type = 'learning_path'
      AND status = 'active'
  ) AND t.week = (
    SELECT current_week 
    FROM student_history 
    WHERE student_id = '{{ $('Find user').item.json.id }}'
      AND activity_type = 'learning_path'
      AND status = 'active'
    LIMIT 1
  ))
)
ORDER BY eta.completed_at DESC NULLS LAST;

SELECT 
  jr.id as job_role_id,
  jr.title as job_role_title,
  jr.description as job_role_description,
  jr.experience_level,
  jr.location,
  jr.type as job_type,
  jr.salary_min,
  jr.salary_max,
  jr.status as job_status,
  jr.created_at as job_created_at,

  -- Assessment details
  jra.id as assessment_id,
  jra.title as assessment_title,
  jra.description as assessment_description,
  jra.difficulty,
  jra.time_limit_hours,
  jra.passing_score,
  jra.assessment_structure,
  jra.learning_plan,
  jra.assessment_sprints,
  jra.skill_validation,
  jra.company_context,
  jra.industry as assessment_industry,
  jra.created_at as assessment_created_at,

  -- GitHub Repository
  jrr.github_repo_id,
  jrr.github_repo_url,
  jrr.github_repo_full_name,

  -- Company details
  c.id as company_id,
  c.name as company_name,
  c.description as company_description,
  c.industry as company_industry,
  c.size as company_size,
  c.location as company_location,
  c.website as company_website,

  -- User's application status (nullable if not applied)
  ja.id as application_id,
  ja.status as application_status,
  ja.created_at as application_created_at,

  -- User's assessment result (nullable if not taken)
  ear.id as result_id,
  ear.score as assessment_score,
  ear.technical_score,
  ear.soft_skills_score,
  ear.consistency_score,
  ear.availability_score,
  ear.passed as assessment_passed,
  ear.assessment_data,
  ear.started_at as assessment_started_at,
  ear.completed_at as assessment_completed_at,
  ear.created_at as result_created_at,

  -- Task count
  COUNT(t.id) as task_count

FROM job_roles jr
INNER JOIN job_role_assessments jra ON jr.id = jra.job_role_id
INNER JOIN companies c ON jr.company_id = c.id
-- LEFT JOIN to get GitHub repository information
LEFT JOIN job_role_repositories jrr ON jr.id = jrr.job_role_id
-- Show all jobs, but include user-specific info if available
LEFT JOIN job_applications ja ON (
  ja.job_role_id = jr.id 
  AND ja.user_id = '{{ $('Find user').item.json.id }}'
)
LEFT JOIN enhanced_assessment_results ear ON (
  ear.job_role_id = jr.id 
  AND ear.user_id = '{{ $('Find user').item.json.id }}'
)
LEFT JOIN tasks t ON jr.id = t.job_role_id

WHERE 
  jr.status = 'active'
  AND jr.company_id != '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'

GROUP BY 
  jr.id, jra.id, c.id, jrr.id, ja.id, ear.id

ORDER BY jr.created_at DESC;

SELECT 
  lpt.id as template_id,
  lpt.title as sprint_title,
  lpt.description as sprint_description,
  lpt.duration_weeks as duration,
  lpt.difficulty_level as difficulty,
  lpt.category as skill_category,
  lpt.icon,
  lpt.color_scheme,
  lpt.prerequisites,
  lpt.learning_objectives,
  lpt.curriculum,
  lpt.resources,
  lpt.assessment_criteria,
  lpt.template_repo_name,
  lpt.target_job_roles,
  lpt.is_featured,
  lpt.is_active,
  lpt.sort_order,
  lpt.created_by,
  lpt.created_at,
  lpt.updated_at,
  
  -- Count enrolled students
  COUNT(slpa.id) as enrolled_students_count,
  
  -- Check if current user is enrolled
  MAX(CASE WHEN slpa.student_id = '{{ $('Find user').item.json.id }}' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as is_user_enrolled,
  
  -- Get user's enrollment status if enrolled
  MAX(CASE WHEN slpa.student_id = '{{ $('Find user').item.json.id }}' THEN slpa.status ELSE NULL END) as user_enrollment_status,
  MAX(CASE WHEN slpa.student_id = '{{ $('Find user').item.json.id }}' THEN slpa.progress_percentage ELSE NULL END) as user_progress,
  MAX(CASE WHEN slpa.student_id = '{{ $('Find user').item.json.id }}' THEN slpa.current_week ELSE NULL END) as user_current_week

FROM learning_path_templates lpt
LEFT JOIN student_learning_path_assignments slpa ON lpt.id = slpa.learning_path_template_id
WHERE 
  lpt.is_active = true
GROUP BY 
  lpt.id, lpt.title, lpt.description, lpt.duration_weeks, lpt.difficulty_level, 
  lpt.category, lpt.icon, lpt.color_scheme, lpt.prerequisites, lpt.learning_objectives, 
  lpt.curriculum, lpt.resources, lpt.assessment_criteria, lpt.template_repo_name, 
  lpt.target_job_roles, lpt.is_featured, lpt.is_active, lpt.sort_order, lpt.created_by, 
  lpt.created_at, lpt.updated_at
ORDER BY 
  lpt.is_featured DESC,  -- Featured sprints first
  enrolled_students_count DESC,  -- Most popular by enrollment
  lpt.sort_order ASC,  -- Then by sort order
  lpt.created_at DESC;  -- Finally by newest

WITH student_info AS (
  SELECT 
    up.user_id,
    up.first_name,
    up.last_name,
    COALESCE(up.first_name || ' ' || up.last_name, s.name, up.user_id) as name,
    COALESCE(s.email, up.user_id) as email,
    COALESCE(s.id, NULL) as sprinter_id,  -- May be null if no sprinter record
    s.started_at
  FROM user_profiles up
  LEFT JOIN sprinters s ON s.user_id = up.user_id
  WHERE up.user_id = '{{ $('Find user').item.json.id }}' 
),

-- Calculate week streak from task completions
week_activity AS (
  -- From student_bucket_assignments (requires sprinter.id)
  SELECT DISTINCT
    DATE_TRUNC('week', sba.completed_at) as week_start,
    DATE_TRUNC('week', sba.completed_at) + INTERVAL '6 days' as week_end
  FROM student_bucket_assignments sba
  INNER JOIN sprinters s ON sba.student_id = s.id
  INNER JOIN student_info si ON s.user_id = si.user_id
  WHERE sba.status = 'completed' 
    AND sba.completed_at IS NOT NULL
  
  UNION
  
  -- From assigned_tasks (uses userId directly)
  SELECT DISTINCT
    DATE_TRUNC('week', at.completed_at) as week_start,
    DATE_TRUNC('week', at.completed_at) + INTERVAL '6 days' as week_end
  FROM assigned_tasks at
  INNER JOIN student_info si ON at.student_id = si.user_id
  WHERE at.status = 'completed'
    AND at.completed_at IS NOT NULL
  
  UNION
  
  -- From student_history (uses userId directly)
  SELECT DISTINCT
    DATE_TRUNC('week', sh.completion_date) as week_start,
    DATE_TRUNC('week', sh.completion_date) + INTERVAL '6 days' as week_end
  FROM student_history sh
  INNER JOIN student_info si ON sh.student_id = si.user_id
  WHERE sh.status = 'completed'
    AND sh.completion_date IS NOT NULL
),

-- Calculate consecutive week streak
week_streak_calc AS (
  SELECT 
    week_start,
    week_end,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY week_start DESC) as week_number,
    week_start - (ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY week_start DESC) * INTERVAL '7 days') as streak_group
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT week_start, week_end FROM week_activity
  ) wa
  ORDER BY week_start DESC
),

current_streak AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) as week_streak
  FROM week_streak_calc
  WHERE streak_group = (
    SELECT streak_group 
    FROM week_streak_calc 
    ORDER BY week_start DESC 
    LIMIT 1
  )
  AND week_end >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
),

-- Tasks completed count
tasks_completed AS (
  -- From student_bucket_assignments
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) as total_completed
  FROM student_bucket_assignments sba
  INNER JOIN sprinters s ON sba.student_id = s.id
  INNER JOIN student_info si ON s.user_id = si.user_id
  WHERE sba.status = 'completed'
  
  UNION ALL
  
  -- From assigned_tasks
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) as total_completed
  FROM assigned_tasks at
  INNER JOIN student_info si ON at.student_id = si.user_id
  WHERE at.status = 'completed'
),

total_tasks_completed AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_completed), 0) as tasks_completed
  FROM tasks_completed
),

-- Certifications completed (both job assessments and learning paths)
certifications_completed AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE activity_type = 'job_assessment') as job_assessment_certs,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE activity_type = 'learning_path') as learning_path_certs,
    COUNT(*) as total_certifications
  FROM student_history sh
  INNER JOIN student_info si ON sh.student_id = si.user_id
  WHERE sh.certification_earned = true
),

-- Badge calculations
badge_earned AS (
  SELECT 
    -- Task completion badges (highest level achieved)
    CASE 
      WHEN (SELECT tasks_completed FROM total_tasks_completed) >= 100 THEN 'TASK_MASTER_100'
      WHEN (SELECT tasks_completed FROM total_tasks_completed) >= 50 THEN 'TASK_MASTER_50'
      WHEN (SELECT tasks_completed FROM total_tasks_completed) >= 25 THEN 'TASK_MASTER_25'
      WHEN (SELECT tasks_completed FROM total_tasks_completed) >= 10 THEN 'TASK_MASTER_10'
      ELSE NULL
    END as task_badge,
    
    -- Week streak badges (highest level achieved)
    CASE 
      WHEN (SELECT week_streak FROM current_streak) >= 52 THEN 'YEAR_STREAK'
      WHEN (SELECT week_streak FROM current_streak) >= 26 THEN 'HALF_YEAR_STREAK'
      WHEN (SELECT week_streak FROM current_streak) >= 12 THEN 'QUARTER_STREAK'
      WHEN (SELECT week_streak FROM current_streak) >= 8 THEN 'TWO_MONTH_STREAK'
      WHEN (SELECT week_streak FROM current_streak) >= 4 THEN 'MONTH_STREAK'
      WHEN (SELECT week_streak FROM current_streak) >= 2 THEN 'TWO_WEEK_STREAK'
      WHEN (SELECT week_streak FROM current_streak) >= 1 THEN 'WEEK_STREAK'
      ELSE NULL
    END as streak_badge,
    
    -- Certification badges (highest level achieved)
    CASE 
      WHEN (SELECT total_certifications FROM certifications_completed) >= 10 THEN 'CERTIFICATION_MASTER_10'
      WHEN (SELECT total_certifications FROM certifications_completed) >= 5 THEN 'CERTIFICATION_MASTER_5'
      WHEN (SELECT total_certifications FROM certifications_completed) >= 3 THEN 'CERTIFICATION_MASTER_3'
      WHEN (SELECT total_certifications FROM certifications_completed) >= 1 THEN 'CERTIFICATION_EARNED'
      ELSE NULL
    END as certification_badge,
    
    -- Perfect score badge
    CASE 
      WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM student_bucket_assignments sba
        INNER JOIN sprinters s ON sba.student_id = s.id
        INNER JOIN student_info si ON s.user_id = si.user_id
        WHERE sba.score = 100 AND sba.status = 'completed'
      ) THEN 'PERFECT_SCORE'
      ELSE NULL
    END as perfect_score_badge,
    
    -- Early completion badge
    CASE 
      WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM student_bucket_assignments sba
        INNER JOIN sprinters s ON sba.student_id = s.id
        INNER JOIN student_info si ON s.user_id = si.user_id
        WHERE sba.completed_at < sba.due_date 
          AND sba.status = 'completed'
          AND sba.due_date IS NOT NULL
      ) THEN 'EARLY_BIRD'
      ELSE NULL
    END as early_bird_badge
),

-- Extract all skills from completed tasks
-- Skills come from bucket_tasks.tags (JSON) and task_buckets.category
completed_task_skills AS (
  -- Extract skills from bucket_tasks.tags
  SELECT DISTINCT
    skill_tag as skill_name,
    tb.category as task_category,
    CASE 
      WHEN tb.category ILIKE '%frontend%' OR tb.category ILIKE '%front-end%' THEN 'Frontend'
      WHEN tb.category ILIKE '%backend%' OR tb.category ILIKE '%back-end%' THEN 'Backend'
      WHEN tb.category ILIKE '%database%' OR tb.category ILIKE '%db%' THEN 'Database'
      WHEN tb.category ILIKE '%devops%' OR tb.category ILIKE '%dev-ops%' THEN 'DevOps'
      WHEN tb.category ILIKE '%ai%' OR tb.category ILIKE '%ml%' OR tb.category ILIKE '%machine%' THEN 'AI/ML'
      WHEN tb.category ILIKE '%security%' OR tb.category ILIKE '%cyber%' THEN 'Security'
      WHEN tb.category ILIKE '%blockchain%' OR tb.category ILIKE '%web3%' THEN 'Blockchain'
      WHEN tb.category ILIKE '%system%' OR tb.category ILIKE '%sys%' THEN 'System'
      ELSE 'Other'
    END as skill_category
  FROM student_bucket_assignments sba
  INNER JOIN sprinters s ON sba.student_id = s.id
  INNER JOIN student_info si ON s.user_id = si.user_id
  INNER JOIN bucket_tasks bt ON bt.id = sba.bucket_task_id
  INNER JOIN task_buckets tb ON tb.id = bt.bucket_id
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(
      CASE 
        WHEN bt.tags IS NOT NULL AND bt.tags != '' THEN bt.tags::jsonb
        ELSE '[]'::jsonb
      END
    ) as skill_tag
  ) tags_expanded
  WHERE sba.status = 'completed'
    AND bt.tags IS NOT NULL 
    AND bt.tags != ''
    AND bt.tags != '[]'
  
  UNION
  
  -- Also extract skills from tasks table if linked (for learning path tasks)
  SELECT DISTINCT
    skill_element as skill_name,
    t.category as task_category,
    CASE 
      WHEN t.category ILIKE '%frontend%' OR t.category ILIKE '%front-end%' THEN 'Frontend'
      WHEN t.category ILIKE '%backend%' OR t.category ILIKE '%back-end%' THEN 'Backend'
      WHEN t.category ILIKE '%database%' OR t.category ILIKE '%db%' THEN 'Database'
      WHEN t.category ILIKE '%devops%' OR t.category ILIKE '%dev-ops%' THEN 'DevOps'
      WHEN t.category ILIKE '%ai%' OR t.category ILIKE '%ml%' OR t.category ILIKE '%machine%' THEN 'AI/ML'
      WHEN t.category ILIKE '%security%' OR t.category ILIKE '%cyber%' THEN 'Security'
      WHEN t.category ILIKE '%blockchain%' OR t.category ILIKE '%web3%' THEN 'Blockchain'
      WHEN t.category ILIKE '%system%' OR t.category ILIKE '%sys%' THEN 'System'
      ELSE 'Other'
    END as skill_category
  FROM student_history sh
  INNER JOIN student_info si ON sh.student_id = si.user_id
  INNER JOIN tasks t ON (
    (t.learning_path_template_id::text = sh.activity_id AND sh.activity_type = 'learning_path')
    OR (t.job_role_id::text = sh.activity_id AND sh.activity_type = 'job_assessment')
  )
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(
      CASE 
        WHEN t.skills IS NOT NULL AND t.skills != '' THEN t.skills::jsonb
        ELSE '[]'::jsonb
      END
    ) as skill_element
  ) skills_expanded
  WHERE sh.status = 'completed'
    AND t.skills IS NOT NULL 
    AND t.skills != ''
    AND t.skills != '[]'
),

-- Map skills to programming language categories
skill_category_mapping AS (
  SELECT 
    skill_name,
    skill_category,
    CASE 
      -- Frontend skills
      WHEN LOWER(skill_name) IN ('javascript', 'typescript', 'react', 'vue', 'angular', 'next.js', 'html', 'css', 'sass', 'scss', 'tailwind', 'bootstrap') THEN 'Frontend'
      
      -- Backend skills
      WHEN LOWER(skill_name) IN ('node.js', 'nodejs', 'python', 'java', 'c#', 'go', 'rust', 'php', 'ruby', 'django', 'flask', 'express', 'nestjs', 'spring', 'laravel') THEN 'Backend'
      
      -- Database skills
      WHEN LOWER(skill_name) IN ('sql', 'postgresql', 'mysql', 'mongodb', 'redis', 'cassandra', 'oracle', 'sqlite', 'dynamodb') THEN 'Database'
      
      -- DevOps skills
      WHEN LOWER(skill_name) IN ('docker', 'kubernetes', 'ci/cd', 'jenkins', 'git', 'github', 'gitlab', 'terraform', 'ansible', 'chef', 'puppet') THEN 'DevOps'
      
      -- AI/ML skills
      WHEN LOWER(skill_name) IN ('machine learning', 'deep learning', 'tensorflow', 'pytorch', 'scikit-learn', 'pandas', 'numpy', 'ai', 'ml', 'neural networks', 'nlp', 'computer vision') THEN 'AI/ML'
      
      -- Security skills
      WHEN LOWER(skill_name) IN ('cybersecurity', 'security', 'penetration testing', 'ethical hacking', 'owasp', 'ssl', 'tls', 'encryption', 'authentication', 'authorization') THEN 'Security'
      
      -- Blockchain skills
      WHEN LOWER(skill_name) IN ('blockchain', 'web3', 'solidity', 'ethereum', 'smart contracts', 'cryptocurrency', 'defi', 'nft') THEN 'Blockchain'
      
      -- System skills
      WHEN LOWER(skill_name) IN ('linux', 'unix', 'system administration', 'networking', 'operating systems', 'shell scripting', 'bash', 'powershell') THEN 'System'
      
      -- Use task category if skill doesn't match
      ELSE COALESCE(skill_category, 'Other')
    END as programming_category
  FROM completed_task_skills
),

-- Calculate skill percentages by category
skill_percentages_by_category AS (
  SELECT 
    programming_category,
    COUNT(DISTINCT skill_name) as skills_count,
    ROUND(
      (COUNT(DISTINCT skill_name)::numeric / 
       NULLIF(
         (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT skill_name) FROM skill_category_mapping), 
         0
       )) * 100, 
      2
    ) as category_percentage
  FROM skill_category_mapping
  WHERE programming_category IN ('Frontend', 'Backend', 'Database', 'DevOps', 'AI/ML', 'Security', 'Blockchain', 'System')
  GROUP BY programming_category
),

-- Individual skill percentages
skill_percentages AS (
  SELECT 
    skill_name,
    programming_category,
    COUNT(*) as task_count,
    ROUND(
      (COUNT(*)::numeric / 
       NULLIF(
         (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM skill_category_mapping WHERE skill_name = scm.skill_name),
         0
       )) * 100,
      2
    ) as skill_percentage
  FROM skill_category_mapping scm
  GROUP BY skill_name, programming_category
),

-- Main result set
main_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    si.user_id,
    si.name,
    si.email,
    COALESCE(cs.week_streak, 0) as week_streak,
    COALESCE(ttc.tasks_completed, 0) as tasks_completed,
    COALESCE(cc.job_assessment_certs, 0) as job_assessment_certifications,
    COALESCE(cc.learning_path_certs, 0) as learning_path_certifications,
    COALESCE(cc.total_certifications, 0) as total_certifications,
    -- Badges as JSON array (only non-null badges)
    COALESCE(
      jsonb_agg(
        jsonb_build_object('type', badge_type, 'name', badge_name)
      ) FILTER (WHERE badge_name IS NOT NULL),
      '[]'::jsonb
    ) as badges_earned
  FROM student_info si
  CROSS JOIN current_streak cs
  CROSS JOIN total_tasks_completed ttc
  CROSS JOIN certifications_completed cc
  CROSS JOIN badge_earned be
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
    VALUES
      ('task', be.task_badge),
      ('streak', be.streak_badge),
      ('certification', be.certification_badge),
      ('achievement', be.perfect_score_badge),
      ('achievement', be.early_bird_badge)
  ) AS badges(badge_type, badge_name)
  GROUP BY si.user_id, si.name, si.email, cs.week_streak, ttc.tasks_completed, 
           cc.job_assessment_certs, cc.learning_path_certs, cc.total_certifications
)

-- Final output with all statistics
SELECT 
  ms.*,
  -- Skills by category as JSON
  (
    SELECT jsonb_object_agg(programming_category, category_percentage)
    FROM skill_percentages_by_category
  ) as skills_by_category,
  -- Individual skills as JSON array
  (
    SELECT jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'skill', skill_name,
        'category', programming_category,
        'percentage', skill_percentage,
        'task_count', task_count
      )
      ORDER BY skill_percentage DESC
    )
    FROM skill_percentages
    LIMIT 20  -- Top 20 skills
  ) as top_skills
  FROM main_stats ms;

SELECT 
  id,
  name,
  description,
  short_description,
  prize,
  prize_details,
  github_repo,
  tags,
  category,
  TO_CHAR(start_date, 'Dy Mon DD HH12:MI AM') as start_date_formatted,
  TO_CHAR(end_date, 'Dy Mon DD HH12:MI AM') as end_date_formatted,
  start_date,
  end_date,
  status,
  is_public,
  is_active,
  location,
  max_participants,
  current_participants,
  created_by,
  organizer_name,
  organizer_email,
  banner_url,
  website_url,
  created_at,
  updated_at,
  CASE 
    WHEN status = 'upcoming' AND start_date > NOW() THEN 'Upcoming'
    WHEN status = 'active' AND NOW() BETWEEN start_date AND end_date THEN 'Active'
    WHEN status = 'completed' OR (end_date < NOW() AND status != 'cancelled') THEN 'Completed'
    WHEN status = 'cancelled' THEN 'Cancelled'
    ELSE 'Unknown'
  END as current_status
FROM hackathons
WHERE is_active = true
ORDER BY start_date DESC;
